name: slipstream
description: Slipstream — ride the leader, land low-latency: a smart Solana transaction stack (Jito bundles, Yellowstone gRPC lifecycle tracking, Claude-powered autonomous retry agent)

scripts.dashboard:data: mkdir -p dashboard/public/data && cp logs/lifecycle.jsonl logs/agent-decisions.jsonl dashboard/public/data/ && echo 'synced real logs -> dashboard/public/data'
